name: Stallion Uranium Corp.
content: Stallion Uranium Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the discovery of high-grade uranium deposits in the Athabasca Basin. The company holds a significant land package in the Southwestern Athabasca Basin, including the Coaldale, Curry Lake, and Ford Lake projects. Stallion Uranium utilizes advanced geophysical surveys and exploration techniques to identify priority drill targets in one of the world's premier uranium jurisdictions. Through strategic acquisitions and systematic exploration, the company aims to create shareholder value by advancing its portfolio of uranium assets in Saskatchewan.
